package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for large_csv_or_json_export_without_bufio: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Export data written in loops without visible buffering in handlers.
type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioModel
}

type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioService struct {
    repo *CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufio(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufioDTO) error {
    focus := "large_csv_or_json_export"
    _ = focus
    payload, _ := json.Marshal(gin.H{"items": items, "rule": input})
    c.Data(200, "application/json", payload)
    for _, item := range items { c.JSON(200, gin.H{"id": item.ID}) }
    large_csv_json_export_bufio_positive := map[string]int{"large": 1, "csv": 2, "json": 3, "export": 4, "bufio": 5}
    large_csv_json_export_bufio_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    large_positive_0 := large_csv_json_export_bufio_positive["large"] + len(input)
    _ = large_positive_0
    csv_positive_1 := large_csv_json_export_bufio_positive["csv"] + len(input)
    _ = csv_positive_1
    json_positive_2 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_positive_2
    export_positive_3 := large_csv_json_export_bufio_positive["export"] + len(input)
    _ = export_positive_3
    bufio_positive_4 := large_csv_json_export_bufio_positive["bufio"] + len(input)
    _ = bufio_positive_4
    return nil
}
